{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lord of the Broken
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lord of the Broken]] is a title held by [[Zyrellon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
